{{Liquipedia links|valorant=WD_Black_Cup/2}} {{Skyesports Navbox}} {{DISPLAYTITLE: WD Black Cup: Season 2}} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=4 |name=WD Black Cup: Season 2 |tickername=WD Black Cup: S2 |shortname=WD Black Cup: S2 |image=Wd black open.png |icon=Wd black open.png |type=Online |team_number=18 |series=WD Black Cup |organizer=Skyesports |organizer-link=http://www.skyesports.in/ |sponsor=[https://www.amd.com/en AMD]
[https://www.westerndigital.com WD Black] |mode=squads |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=500,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-12-06 |edate=2021-12-09 |twitter=skyesportsindia |instagram=skyesportsgaming |web=http://www.skyesports.in/ |facebook=skyesportindia |loco=SKYESPORTSHINDI |youtube=channel/UCrsY_XXxKmCI8AI8gRf-0uw }} '''''[http://www.skyesports.in/ Skyesports]''''' in association with '''''[https://www.westerndigital.com WD Black]''''' present the second edition of the WD Black Cup called the '''WD Black Cup: Season 2''' with a prize pool of ₹5,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. The '''''WD Black Cup: Season 2 ''''' has already culminated in Valorant. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=2em}} {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator
